title: Enterprise SSO: Okta Integration
description:
Implements full Okta SSO integration for enterprise customers.

## Changes
- Added Okta OAuth2/OIDC flow
- SAML assertion validation
- Token exchange mechanism
- Callback URL handling with edge case fixes

## Testing
- Unit tests for all auth components
- Integration test for full SSO flow
- Manual testing with Okta developer account

## Related
- Jira: AUTH-1234
- Jira: AUTH-1235
author: jane.smith

comments.author: alice.chen
comments.body: Looks good overall. Consider adding rate limiting on the callback endpoint.

title: User Provisioning via Okta Directory Sync
description:
Adds support for automatic user provisioning when organizations enable Okta directory sync.

## Changes
- SCIM 2.0 endpoint for user provisioning
- Directory sync webhook handler
- User model updates for SSO-linked accounts

## Related
- Jira: AUTH-1236
author: bob.jones

comments.author: jane.smith
comments.body: Should we handle deprovisioning as well? Maybe a follow-up ticket.
